## Summary

I implemented **`internal/generate/integration_test.go`** — the PRD §20.1 layer-3 end-to-end integration suite for `generate.CommitStaged`.

### What was built
- **White-box `package generate`** — so it can name the package-private `gitClient`/`runner` interfaces and compose the in-package stub helpers (`BuildStubBinary`/`NewStubManifest`/`StubConfig`/`StubResponse`).
- **Raw-git bootstrap helpers** (`gitRun`/`newTempRepo`/`writeStage`/`seedCommit`) — Decision A: the `internal/git` harness is white-box `package git` (unreachable), and `*git.Git` exposes only plumbing, so bootstrap drives the REAL git binary via `os/exec`, mirroring `gittestutil_test.go` conventions exactly.
- **`e2eDeps`** — wires the REAL `*git.Git` + REAL `*provider.Executor` + stub Manifest + `config.Default()`.
- **`headMoverRunner`** decorator — Decision C: advances HEAD deterministically during `Run` via plumbing on `HEAD^{tree}` (never `git commit --allow-empty`).
- **All 7 contract paths** asserting against REAL git (`cat-file`/`log %B`/`rev-parse`/`diff --cached`): SUCCESS, DUP-RETRY-THEN-SUCCESS, PARSE-FAIL-THEN-RESCUE (Decision D: `Emit:""`, since non-empty parses `ok=true`), TIMEOUT, CAS-FAILURE, ROOT-COMMIT, NOTHING-STAGED.

### Validation gates (all pass)
| Level | Gate | Result |
|-------|------|--------|
| 1a | `go build ./internal/generate/` | ✅ |
| 1b | `go vet ./internal/generate/` | ✅ |
| 1c | `gofmt` clean | ✅ |
| 2 | `go build ./internal/generate/testdata/stubagent` | ✅ |
| 3 | `go test -run Integration -v` | ✅ **7/7** |
| 4 | `go test ./...` | ✅ all packages |

### Notes
- The only fix during validation: the NOTHING-STAGED "no dangling tree" assertion originally compared against the empty-tree SHA, but the seeded repo's index reflects HEAD (not empty). Corrected to assert `write-tree == HEAD^{tree}` (no *new* snapshot tree created — the meaningful invariant).
- No shipped files modified (`git diff` empty); only the new test file added.

All validation gates pass: go build/vet/gofmt clean, stubagent builds, `go test -run Integration -v` → 7/7 subtests, and `go test ./...` → all packages green. No shipped files modified.
